_comment: AI draft — Products batch. Two term normalizations: Stock bakhaar->kayd (owner: Kayd), Packaging baakad/xidhmad->xirmo (owner: Xirmo). ⚠ = Xirmo inflection to confirm (esp. plural 'Xirmooyin'). Plus clear fixes.
saleVoidConfirmBody: Iibka waa la tirtiri doonaa, alaabta kaydka waa lugu celin doonaa, deynta macmiilkana waa la tirtiri doonaa.
receiveVoidConfirmBody: Tan u isticmaal kaliya marka aad qaladka u dhigtay alaab dejinta. Alaab dejinta waa la tirtiri doonaa, alaabta kaydka waa laga dhimi doonaa, oo lacagta aad alaab keenaha ka qabto waa la tirtiri doonaa.
stockAdjustUnitCostRequiredMessage: Geli qiimaha xirmada si qiimaha celceliska u sii saxo.
addNewItemLoadOptionsFailedHint: Soo jeedimaha lama soo dejin karin. Dooro xirmo gaar ah.
addPackagingFailedMessage: Xirmada luguma dari karin. Isku day mar kale.
addPackagingNoSuggestionsHint: Halbeegan wali xirmooyin la isticmaalo uma jiraan — hoosta ka qor mid gaar ah.
packagingEditorMissingConversionMessage: Imisa unug aasaasi ah ayaa ku jira xirmadan? Geli tiro ka weyn 0.
shopItemEditorOpeningSubtitle: Geli kayd hadda xirmo walba si warbixinada saxda u shaqeeyaan maalintaa.
removePackagingConfirmBody: Ma tirtirayaa xirmadan? Mar dambe wad ku celin kartaa.
shopItemEditorDiscoverySubtitle: Magacyo kale + sida bonada loo qoro ayaa raadinta ka horumarinaya.
